Business Communications.
Solved.
Communicate with your customers and staff like never before via SMS and MMS.
From single to scale by web app or API.
Get sending for free
Book a demo
Or if you're a developer
read our API docs.
Simple, Reliable  Messaging Products  for Every Business
At ClickSend we create messaging products that are easy to use and highly integratable providing choice and context for your business communications. Our products are used by some of the biggest brands and smartest developers
                around
                the
                world
                Whether it’s transactional SMS messages at scale via API or seasonal marketing campaigns using SMS and MMS, ClickSend helps you get and stay closer to your customers and staff.
Business SMS
Business MMS
Rich Messaging
Business SMS
Send, Receive & Track SMS
Messages Worldwide
Send, Receive & Track SMS Messages Worldwide
Send and receive text messages 
                            around
                            the
                            
                            around the globe. From a few to a few million via dashboard or API always through direct routes.
SMS marketing
SMS broadcasts
Alerts and notifications
Get Sending
Read API Docs
Business MMS
MMS Messaging Service
MMS Messaging Service
Sometimes you need more than words and our MMS messaging service enables you to add multimedia content to your business messages.
Access up to 1,600 characters
Include images and sound
Track your MMS campaigns
Get Sending
Read API Docs
Rich Messaging
Rich Messaging
Rich Messaging
Create and send rich multimedia experiences or engage in real-time conversations by RCS or Messaging Apps. Be an early adopter with us at ClickSend.

World Class APIs,
World Class Documentation,
Loved by Developers

Use SMS and MMS in your software. Build powerful apps using the fastest and most reliable cloud communication APIs.
Read API Docs
And with Hundreds of Integration Partners
Or via Hundreds of Integration Partners
Automate Your Business
Communications
ClickSend integrates with all the business apps you know and love plus a whole lot more. It’s easy to automate repetitive tasks and even build a business communications stack with no code.
With our own ClickSend marketplace, you can integrate with hundreds of the world’s most popular business apps.
Visit Marketplace
We Power Billions Of Messages 
            Around
            the
            World
Why Businesses Love ClickSend
Global 24/7 Support
Our chat is staffed by real humans 24 hours a day, 365 days a year and always will be.
Security and reliability
The ClickSend platform is built on enterprise-level security and provides a 99.95% Uptime SLA guarantee.
Lightning fast delivery
ClickSend lives and breathes high performance direct routes. Your messages get delivered on time.
Get Sending with ClickSend
Join over 90,000 customers sending billions of messages around  the world.

One powerful API, unlimited options
SMS
Text customers around the globe. Most developers send their first message in minutes. With rock-solid reliability, support and compliance — you can breathe easy.
SMS Quickstart Guide
View in API Docs
MMS
Send images and videos over text via a trusted API. Reliable and global with fast calls, no stress and no fuss.

MCP Server
Connect your AI assistant to ClickSend via MCP and get it to handle sends, stats and contact management for you – no extra code required.

analysis.name: ClickSend
analysis.value_proposition: Simple, reliable business SMS and MMS messaging via web dashboard or API, from single messages to enterprise scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Businesses and developers who need reliable transactional or marketing SMS/MMS at any scale, paying only for what they send

features.name: bulk sms
features.description: Send high-volume SMS campaigns worldwide from dashboard or API
features.evidence_quote: From a few to a few million via dashboard or API always through direct routes

features.name: email to sms
features.description: Send SMS messages by sending an email
features.evidence_quote: Email to SMS

features.name: sms api
features.description: REST API for programmatic SMS sending
features.evidence_quote: Start building with a battle-tested messaging API

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: SMS marketing campaigns and broadcasts
features.evidence_quote: SMS marketing / SMS broadcasts

features.name: ai messaging
features.description: AI-assisted messaging feature
features.evidence_quote: AI Messaging

features.description: Send and receive multimedia messages (images, sound, up to 1600 chars)
features.evidence_quote: MMS messaging service enables you to add multimedia content

features.evidence_quote: Get early access to RCS messaging

features.evidence_quote: Facebook Messenger

features.name: whatsapp business
features.description: Messaging via WhatsApp Business channel
features.evidence_quote: WhatsApp Business

features.name: two-way sms
features.description: Inbound reply handling for conversational SMS
features.evidence_quote: Two-way texting / Talk to customers via SMS

features.name: free inbound sms
features.description: Replies and inbound messages are always free
features.evidence_quote: Free Inbound Messaging / Replies are always free

features.name: scheduled sms
features.description: Schedule messages to send at chosen times
features.evidence_quote: Schedule texts / Send at the right time, every time

features.name: contact segmentation
features.description: Segment contact lists for targeted sends
features.evidence_quote: Segment contacts / Use contact list to segment

features.name: unlimited users
features.description: No per-seat charges — unlimited team members
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited users / You'll never pay for extra seats

features.name: pay-as-you-go billing
features.description: Top-up credit model with no subscription
features.evidence_quote: Pay-as-you-go / Not another subscription

features.name: volume discounts
features.description: Per-message rate drops as top-up amount grows
features.evidence_quote: Volume discounts / Send more to spend less

features.name: dedicated virtual number
features.description: Dedicated inbound number for $3.45/month
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated Number $3.45 / month

features.name: dedicated shortcode
features.description: Dedicated SMS shortcode
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated Shortcode $999.78 / month

features.name: delivery tracking
features.description: Track SMS/MMS delivery and campaign performance
features.evidence_quote: Send, Receive & Track SMS Messages Worldwide

features.name: web dashboard
features.description: User-friendly web app for sending campaigns in a few clicks
features.evidence_quote: With ClickSend's user friendly dashboard it's easy to send SMS and MMS campaigns in just a few clicks

features.name: 24/7 support
features.description: Round-the-clock human support included on every top-up
features.evidence_quote: Free 24/7 support / We're always here to support you

features.name: global coverage
features.description: Direct-route delivery to 190+ countries
features.evidence_quote: 190+ countries globally

features.name: high throughput
features.description: 100M SMS per month capacity with 5m avg time to send
features.evidence_quote: 100M SMS per month

features.name: uptime sla
features.description: 99.95% uptime guarantee
features.evidence_quote: 99.95% uptime guarantee

features.evidence_quote: 10 coding languages

features.evidence_quote: Head over to our Postman guide and start testing our API

features.evidence_quote: Automated SMS / Send from websites or apps

free_tier.limits: $2 AUD free test credit for new accounts only

tiers.name: Boost
tiers.headline_inclusions: $0.0271/SMS, top-up from $20 — small businesses & one-off campaigns

pricing.notes: Pure pay-as-you-go credit top-up model — no monthly subscription. Per-SMS rate scales with top-up size (4 published tiers Boost/Growth/Scale/Enterprise, plus bulk discounts via sales). MMS flat $0.0365/msg. Dedicated number $3.45/mo, dedicated shortcode $999.78/mo + $999.78 setup. Inbound SMS always free. Additional carrier fees apply. Billing available in 15+ currencies. New-customer promos: 50% extra free on first top-up (global), 25% off first top-up (UK).
